name: Tobacco/Nicotine Use Disorder Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for tobacco use, nicotine dependence, and related disorders. Used to identify current tobacco users in the tobacco screening and cessation measure.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
